law.text:
SECTION II. - INTENTIONAL KILLING, NOT CALLED MANSLAUGHTER, AND INTENTIONAL INFLICTION OF BODILY INJURY.

Art. 398. Whoever intentionally inflicts injuries or blows shall be punished by imprisonment of eight days to six months and a fine of twenty-six [euro] to one hundred [euro] or by one of these punishments only.
If the offender has acted with premeditation, he shall be sentenced to imprisonment of one month to one year and to a fine of fifty [euro] to two hundred [euro].

Art. 399. If the blows or injuries cause illness or incapacity to perform personal labor as a result, the offender shall be punished by imprisonment of two months to two years and a fine of fifty [euro] to two hundred [euro].
The offender shall be punished by imprisonment of six months to three years and a fine of one hundred [euro] to five hundred [euro] if he has acted with premeditation.

Art. 400. The punishment shall be imprisonment of two years to five years and a fine of two hundred [euro] to five hundred [euro] if the blows or injuries result in an apparently incurable disease, incapacity to perform personal labor for more than four months, the complete loss of use of an organ, or a severe mutilation.
The punishment shall be incarceration of five years to ten years in the event the offender has acted with premeditation.

Art. 401. When the blows or injuries are intentionally inflicted, but without the intention to kill, and nevertheless cause death, the offender shall be punished by incarceration of five years to ten years.
He shall be punished by incarceration of ten years to fifteen years if he commits those acts of violence with premeditation.

kb_used.fo:
vocabulary V {
  type Offender
  IntentionallyInflictsWoundsOrBlows: Offender -> Bool
  Premeditation: Offender -> Bool
  CausesIllnessOrIncapacity: Offender -> Bool
  CausesIncurableIllnessOrSevereHarm: Offender -> Bool
  CausesDeathWithoutIntentToKill: Offender -> Bool
  imprisonmentMinDays: Offender -> Int
  imprisonmentMaxDays: Offender -> Int
  fineMinEuros: Offender -> Int
  fineMaxEuros: Offender -> Int
}

theory T:V {
  ! o in Offender:
    IntentionallyInflictsWoundsOrBlows(o) & ~CausesIllnessOrIncapacity(o) & ~CausesIncurableIllnessOrSevereHarm(o) & ~CausesDeathWithoutIntentToKill(o) & ~Premeditation(o) =>
      imprisonmentMinDays(o) = 8.
  ! o in Offender:
    IntentionallyInflictsWoundsOrBlows(o) & ~CausesIllnessOrIncapacity(o) & ~CausesIncurableIllnessOrSevereHarm(o) & ~CausesDeathWithoutIntentToKill(o) & ~Premeditation(o) =>
      imprisonmentMaxDays(o) = 180.
  ! o in Offender:
    IntentionallyInflictsWoundsOrBlows(o) & ~CausesIllnessOrIncapacity(o) & ~CausesIncurableIllnessOrSevereHarm(o) & ~CausesDeathWithoutIntentToKill(o) & ~Premeditation(o) =>
      fineMinEuros(o) = 26.
  ! o in Offender:
    IntentionallyInflictsWoundsOrBlows(o) & ~CausesIllnessOrIncapacity(o) & ~CausesIncurableIllnessOrSevereHarm(o) & ~CausesDeathWithoutIntentToKill(o) & ~Premeditation(o) =>
      fineMaxEuros(o) = 100.

  ! o in Offender:
    IntentionallyInflictsWoundsOrBlows(o) & ~CausesIllnessOrIncapacity(o) & ~CausesIncurableIllnessOrSevereHarm(o) & ~CausesDeathWithoutIntentToKill(o) & Premeditation(o) =>
      imprisonmentMinDays(o) = 30.
  ! o in Offender:
    IntentionallyInflictsWoundsOrBlows(o) & ~CausesIllnessOrIncapacity(o) & ~CausesIncurableIllnessOrSevereHarm(o) & ~CausesDeathWithoutIntentToKill(o) & Premeditation(o) =>
      imprisonmentMaxDays(o) = 365.
  ! o in Offender:
    IntentionallyInflictsWoundsOrBlows(o) & ~CausesIllnessOrIncapacity(o) & ~CausesIncurableIllnessOrSevereHarm(o) & ~CausesDeathWithoutIntentToKill(o) & Premeditation(o) =>
      fineMinEuros(o) = 50.
  ! o in Offender:
    IntentionallyInflictsWoundsOrBlows(o) & ~CausesIllnessOrIncapacity(o) & ~CausesIncurableIllnessOrSevereHarm(o) & ~CausesDeathWithoutIntentToKill(o) & Premeditation(o) =>
      fineMaxEuros(o) = 200.

  ! o in Offender:
    CausesIllnessOrIncapacity(o) & ~CausesIncurableIllnessOrSevereHarm(o) & ~CausesDeathWithoutIntentToKill(o) & ~Premeditation(o) =>
      imprisonmentMinDays(o) = 60.
  ! o in Offender:
    CausesIllnessOrIncapacity(o) & ~CausesIncurableIllnessOrSevereHarm(o) & ~CausesDeathWithoutIntentToKill(o) & ~Premeditation(o) =>
      imprisonmentMaxDays(o) = 730.
  ! o in Offender:
    CausesIllnessOrIncapacity(o) & ~CausesIncurableIllnessOrSevereHarm(o) & ~CausesDeathWithoutIntentToKill(o) & ~Premeditation(o) =>
      fineMinEuros(o) = 50.
  ! o in Offender:
    CausesIllnessOrIncapacity(o) & ~CausesIncurableIllnessOrSevereHarm(o) & ~CausesDeathWithoutIntentToKill(o) & ~Premeditation(o) =>
      fineMaxEuros(o) = 200.
  
  ! o in Offender:
    CausesIllnessOrIncapacity(o) & ~CausesIncurableIllnessOrSevereHarm(o) & ~CausesDeathWithoutIntentToKill(o) & Premeditation(o) =>
      imprisonmentMinDays(o) = 180.
  ! o in Offender:
    CausesIllnessOrIncapacity(o) & ~CausesIncurableIllnessOrSevereHarm(o) & ~CausesDeathWithoutIntentToKill(o) & Premeditation(o) =>
      imprisonmentMaxDays(o) = 1095.
  ! o in Offender:
    CausesIllnessOrIncapacity(o) & ~CausesIncurableIllnessOrSevereHarm(o) & ~CausesDeathWithoutIntentToKill(o) & Premeditation(o) =>
      fineMinEuros(o) = 100.
  ! o in Offender:
    CausesIllnessOrIncapacity(o) & ~CausesIncurableIllnessOrSevereHarm(o) & ~CausesDeathWithoutIntentToKill(o) & Premeditation(o) =>
      fineMaxEuros(o) = 500.

  ! o in Offender:
    CausesIncurableIllnessOrSevereHarm(o) & ~CausesDeathWithoutIntentToKill(o) & ~Premeditation(o) =>
      imprisonmentMinDays(o) = 730.
  ! o in Offender:
    CausesIncurableIllnessOrSevereHarm(o) & ~CausesDeathWithoutIntentToKill(o) & ~Premeditation(o) =>
      imprisonmentMaxDays(o) = 1825.
  ! o in Offender:
    CausesIncurableIllnessOrSevereHarm(o) & ~CausesDeathWithoutIntentToKill(o) & ~Premeditation(o) =>
      fineMinEuros(o) = 200.
  ! o in Offender:
    CausesIncurableIllnessOrSevereHarm(o) & ~CausesDeathWithoutIntentToKill(o) & ~Premeditation(o) =>
      fineMaxEuros(o) = 500.

  ! o in Offender:
    CausesIncurableIllnessOrSevereHarm(o) & ~CausesDeathWithoutIntentToKill(o) & Premeditation(o) =>
      imprisonmentMinDays(o) = 1825.
  ! o in Offender:
    CausesIncurableIllnessOrSevereHarm(o) & ~CausesDeathWithoutIntentToKill(o) & Premeditation(o) =>
      imprisonmentMaxDays(o) = 3650.

  ! o in Offender:
    CausesDeathWithoutIntentToKill(o) & ~Premeditation(o) =>
      imprisonmentMinDays(o) = 1825.
  ! o in Offender:
    CausesDeathWithoutIntentToKill(o) & ~Premeditation(o) =>
      imprisonmentMaxDays(o) = 3650.

  ! o in Offender:
    CausesDeathWithoutIntentToKill(o) & Premeditation(o) =>
      imprisonmentMinDays(o) = 3650.
  ! o in Offender:
    CausesDeathWithoutIntentToKill(o) & Premeditation(o) =>
      imprisonmentMaxDays(o) = 5475.
}

case.text: Jan and Marie work at the same office. After an argument, Jan waits for Marie in the parking lot and deliberately hits her with a stick. Marie breaks her arm and has to stay home for four weeks; she cannot perform her work. Jan acted with premeditation: he had brought the stick and waited for her. The injuries did not cause any incurable disease or organ loss.

questions.text: What is the minimum prison sentence for Jan?

pipeline.natural_language: The minimum prison sentence for Jan is 180 days.
